## Verification

- [ ] `pytest` passes locally
- [ ] `ruff check src tests` is clean
- [ ] If a new feature, tests added under `tests/`
- [ ] If a new decoration hash, added to `src/hideout_art/constants.py`
      AND the source hideout is mentioned in the commit message
- [ ] If a public API change, `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `[Unreleased]`
- [ ] If a docs change, `README.md` and/or `docs/` updated

<!-- Anything you want them to look at carefully. -->
